name: MoneyGram
description_short: MoneyGram is a money transfer service with 36+ locations across New Orleans, enabling customers to send and receive funds online or through physical agent locations.
description_long:
MoneyGram operates as a global money transfer provider with a significant physical presence in New Orleans, Louisiana. The company maintains partnerships with established retail locations including CVS, Ace Cash Express, convenience stores, and specialty markets to offer accessible money transfer services throughout the city.

MoneyGram's core offering centers on domestic and international money transfer capabilities. Customers can send and receive money through multiple channels—both online platforms and in-person at agent locations. The service emphasizes convenience by allowing customers to search for nearby locations, check operating hours, and access transfers outside traditional banking hours at numerous partner retail establishments.

The company distinguishes itself through its extensive agent network rather than standalone brick-and-mortar branches. By partnering with CVS pharmacies, check-cashing services (Ace Cash Express), grocery stores (Ideal Discount Supermarket, La Morenita Plus), and convenience shops, MoneyGram embeds itself into existing community retail infrastructure. This model provides geographic accessibility across New Orleans neighborhoods with 36 searchable locations. The service operates with extended hours—many locations open until 10 PM to 11:59 PM—accommodating customers outside standard banking windows.

MoneyGram serves a practical function for unbanked and underbanked populations needing reliable money transfer without traditional bank accounts. However, the website content does not disclose fee structures, exchange rates, transfer speeds, or comparative pricing data. The lack of transparent cost information is a notable limitation for consumers evaluating this service against competitors. While the location finder is functional and comprehensive for the New Orleans area, the public-facing website provides minimal detail about actual service terms or customer protections.
address: 500 N Carrollton Ave, New Orleans, LA 70119

company_info.headquarters: 500 N Carrollton Ave, New Orleans, LA 70119

pros: 36 locations across New Orleans with extended operating hours until 10 PM–11:59 PM for consumer convenience
Partnership with recognizable retailers (CVS, Ace Cash Express, Ideal Discount Supermarket) for accessible agent locations
Online and in-person service options allowing flexible transaction methods
Location search tool with address, city, state, and ZIP code filtering for easy nearest-location identification
Service available in underserved neighborhoods beyond traditional banking hours
Established global brand with multi-decade operational history
No requirement for bank account to send or receive money transfers
cons: Website does not disclose transfer fees, making cost comparison impossible for consumers
No published information on exchange rates for international transfers
Transfer speed expectations not specified on location pages or service overview
Limited transparency regarding service terms, limits, or eligibility requirements
Relies entirely on third-party retail locations rather than dedicated customer service facilities
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked individuals needing reliable money transfer without bank accounts
Customers seeking evening and weekend money transfer access beyond traditional banking hours
Residents in New Orleans neighborhoods with convenient retail agent locations nearby
International money senders needing established, recognizable transfer provider
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked consumers and international money senders who prioritize geographic accessibility and extended operating hours over cost transparency. The primary caveat is the complete absence of published fee schedules and exchange rate information on the public website, requiring customers to contact individual locations directly for pricing details before committing to transfers.
services: Domestic money transfers to recipients in the United States
International money transfers to recipients outside the United States
In-person cash pickup at agent locations
Online money transfer initiation and management
Location search and nearest-agent finder tool
Extended-hours service through retail partner network
Money transfer services at CVS pharmacy locations
Money transfer services at check-cashing retailers (Ace Cash Express)
Money transfer services at grocery and specialty market locations
